assumptions.telemetryClaim: The repository authorizes one capped canary. Runtime readiness still requires live emissions from every declared producer.
assumptions.accountIdentity: execution_account_id is an opaque identifier and must never contain a wallet, user name, email, or venue credential

metrics.name: robin_unhedged_duration_seconds
metrics.semantics: Wall-clock seconds since an episode first became directionally unhedged; zero only after both venues reconcile flat or hedged.

metrics.name: robin_source_age_seconds
metrics.semantics: Current time minus the authoritative observed-at time, never the scrape or publish time.

metrics.name: robin_source_gap_open
metrics.semantics: One from first detected sequence discontinuity until REST reconstruction and sequence reconciliation complete; otherwise zero.

metrics.name: robin_margin_coverage_ratio
metrics.semantics: Verified collateral divided by maintenance margin using the authoritative account snapshot.

metrics.name: robin_unknown_positions
metrics.semantics: Positions present at a venue that do not reconcile to an admitted episode.

metrics.name: robin_unknown_orders
metrics.semantics: Open or recently terminal orders that do not reconcile to a recorded intent and saga.

metrics.name: robin_nonce_drift
metrics.semantics: Signed or reserved nonce minus the authoritative venue nonce; zero is the only admission-safe value.

metrics.name: robin_signer_failures_total
metrics.semantics: Count of rejected, mismatched, timed-out, or failed signing attempts.

metrics.name: robin_kms_failures_total
metrics.semantics: Count of KMS authorization, key-binding, decryption, public-key, or signing failures.

metrics.name: robin_rpc_finality_disagreement
metrics.semantics: One when the two configured RPC sources disagree about receipt inclusion, status, block hash, or finalized ancestry.

metrics.name: robin_reorgs_total
metrics.semantics: Count of previously observed canonical blocks or receipts removed by a chain reorganization.

metrics.name: robin_command_oldest_pending_seconds
metrics.semantics: Age of the oldest non-terminal user command, measured from its durable creation time.

metrics.name: robin_outbox_oldest_pending_seconds
metrics.semantics: Age of the oldest durable outbox record that has not been reconciled with its downstream consumer.

metrics.name: robin_gas_balance_wei
metrics.semantics: Latest finalized native-token balance for the user deployment payer or non-exportable execution signer.

metrics.name: robin_gas_runway_seconds
metrics.semantics: Conservative time to gas exhaustion using finalized balance and the configured upper-bound transaction burn rate.

metrics.name: robin_gas_ready
metrics.semantics: One only when finalized gas balance satisfies the versioned readiness policy; zero otherwise.

metrics.name: robin_control_mode
metrics.semantics: Exactly one series is one for each scope and scope_id across ACTIVE, REDUCE_ONLY, and HALTED; all other mode series are zero.

metrics.name: robin_unresolved_ambiguity
metrics.semantics: One after any send with unknown acceptance or outcome until authoritative reconciliation resolves it.

metrics.name: robin_cross_account_incidents_total
metrics.semantics: Count of attempted or detected credential, key, nonce, vault, signer, response, or event substitution across accounts.

metrics.name: robin_incident_open
metrics.semantics: One while an independently recorded incident is open. High and critical incidents reset that stage's clean-observation clock.

metrics.name: robin_kill_path_last_success_timestamp_seconds
metrics.semantics: Completion time of the last evidence-complete drill for global, strategy, account, guardian, or user restriction authority.

metrics.name: robin_reconciliation_flat
metrics.semantics: One only when authoritative positions and orders are known and flat for the execution account at the named venue.
